## Summary

<!-- What does this PR change and why? -->

## Type of change

- [ ] New concept, property, or vocabulary
- [ ] Change to existing definitions
- [ ] Build pipeline or site change
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Bug fix

## Checklist

- [ ] `just check` passes (validation + build)
- [ ] `uv run pytest` passes
- [ ] Definitions are written in plain language (no jargon)
- [ ] Translations provided for `fr` and `es` (if applicable)
- [ ] Data classification is set correctly on new properties
